title: Titlecard
description: Heavily configurable mod to customize the minecraft window title!
body:
> I am [Titlecard]!
### Welcome to Titlecard!!
a heavily configurable mod for changing the window title of the game, allowing for the display of any text, the fps, the mod count, and more!


Extra included are format specifiers for ease of use
```
"%M" which just puts "Minecraft"
"%V" which gives the version of minecraft you're on
"%S" which puts your username
"%s" which shows the gamestate (playing online, lan or in singleplayer but with a - before it so it'll be "- Singleplayer")
"%d" same as above without the dash
"%I" Shows the name of the server you're connected too (the one you put in add server)
"%i" Shows the ip address + port of the server you're connected too
"%l" Shows current modcount
"%F" Shows your current FPS
```

**Cloth config and Mod Menu recommended for easy in-game config editing/reloading**

Some looks at various Titlecard configurations
![Main menu with the title changed to "I am Steve"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62fb3b9ccb8cfecabaf1db73fec01fd1b00838c7.png)
![Ingame on a server showing the IP and the Username of the player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be201b506416851cab0872493526cfe4b363516a.png)
![Ingame in a single player world showing the mod count, fps and gamestate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfda1e18a1182bea7621f73c8772783d8c5f776f_0.webp)
